# Quantara — Ketchum's Cyber Security & Quantum Physics Labs

> Quantara is a synthetic-reality platform combining a quantum-physics
> research lab (QED solver, CERN-in-a-Pocket precision sweeps,
> scalar-field cosmology) with a walkable 3D world, an evolving AI
> civilization, and a public ledger of solved theories and breakthroughs.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Quantara platform, hero, and entry points.
- [World](/world): First-person walkable synthetic civilization.
- [Atlas](/atlas): 4D Atlas of discoveries and breakthroughs.
- [Ledger](/ledger): Public ledger of solved theories and artifacts.
- [CERN-in-a-Pocket](/cern): In-browser 12-point precision sweep.
- [KVE Lab](/kve): Scalar-field dark-energy cosmology simulator.
- [RG Running](/rg-running): Renormalization-group running visualizer.
- [Synthesis](/synthesis): Theory synthesis workbench.
- [Interstellar](/interstellar): Interstellar mission console.
- [Benchmarks](/benchmarks): QED engine benchmarks and reproducibility.
- [Annex](/annex): Supplementary research notes.

## Legal

- [Legal index](/legal): All licenses and policies.
- [Terms](/legal/terms): Terms of use.
- [Research License](/legal/research-license): Non-commercial research use.
- [Commercial License](/legal/commercial-license): Commercial licensing terms.
- [Creator Policy](/legal/creator-policy): Creator policy.
- [For Collaborators](/legal/collaborators): Collaborator guidelines.
- [Architectural Blueprint](/legal/blueprint): Three-layer architecture and breakthrough registry.
